frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; no angle brackets; description 376 chars (within ceiling); allowed-tools hyphenated; owns appropriately empty for meta skill; composes_with lists real skills.

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Generate), 4+ trigger contexts, keyword variants, exclusion clause. 376 chars overshoots 200-char target but stays under 1024 ceiling.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 131 lines / ~819 words. Both references linked with when-to-read guidance. frontmatter-spec.md at 247 lines is below 300-line TOC threshold.

instruction_clarity.notes: Numbered Steps 1-5 with imperative voice. Skill-type table crisp. Body-structure list well organized. Common Mistakes section names anti-patterns with rationale.

coordination.notes: composes_with [project-profiler, orchestrator] accurate but should also include skill-review and skill-update since both reference frontmatter-spec.md as authoritative.

completeness.notes: Both reference files exist. Validate-the-Skill checklist concrete. Directory structure illustrated. v1.1 resolved-conflicts referenced.

anti_patterns.notes: Common Mistakes section enumerates 6 anti-patterns including hardcoded project details. Imperative voice throughout. No emojis, no excessive MUST/NEVER, no hardcoded paths.

important.item: Description at 376 chars is ~1.9x the 200-char house target
important.fix: Trim by removing the trailing 'Also use when reviewing existing skills for spec compliance.' (covered by skill-review) and tighten keyword variants. Target ≤250 chars.

nits.item: composes_with should include skill-review and skill-update
nits.fix: Add both to the composes_with list.

nits.item: Skill Directory Structure shows templates/ subdirectory not used by any skill in repo
nits.fix: Remove the templates/ line or document why nesting is recommended.

nits.item: v1.1 resolved-conflicts reference lacks direct section anchor
Step 5 Validate checklist lacks concrete command for ownership conflict checking
nits.fix: Add a suggested git grep or scan command for ownership conflicts.

top_fixes.fix: Trim description to under 250 chars by removing the review-existing-skills clause
Add skill-review and skill-update to composes_with
Link to frontmatter-spec.md's Resolved Conflicts section directly
